Our Vision

Building the Future of
Conscious Snacking

Rooted in traditional Indian wisdom. Refined through modern food science.
Committed to a healthier, more mindful tomorrow.

Our North Star

"To transform snacking into a daily ritual of wellness."

Guiding every product and decision at WIN-DIA

Our Framework

Vision Pillars

Four pillars supporting our mission to revolutionize snacking

Global Reach

Bringing Indian wellness ideas to broader markets around the world

Innovation

Continuous development with food science backing and CFTRI collaboration

Health Impact

Supporting better digestion and mindful eating through functional nutrition

Scale

Building a trusted wellness brand rooted in traditional Indian wisdom

The Path Forward

Our Roadmap

This roadmap reflects our future vision and direction

2024

Foundation

Early stage growth and market presence

2025

Growth

Product expansion begins across India

2026

Expansion

Planned entry into global markets

2028

Leadership

Strong category presence in wellness

2030

Vision

Global wellness positioning

Innovation Pipeline

Products of Tomorrow

All products are rooted in traditional wisdom and refined through food science

Phase 1 — Available Now
Coconut Khakhra
Coconut flour base
Phase 2 — In Development
High-fiber pasta
Protein noodles
Pizza base
Phase 3 — Planned Expansion
Functional biscuits
Ready-to-eat rice
Snack bars
Phase 4 — Future Innovation
Advanced CFTRI-based products
Global snack formats
Wellness combinations
Global Ambition

Middle East

Southeast Asia

Europe

North America

🌍 WIN-DIA aims to bring Indian wellness wisdom to wellness-conscious consumers worldwide
